comment.body: Guys, are there indications things are sorted out? No!! Countless times you have been told since last year… the risk won’t be removed in one day, even maybe a week…Do you all see the chart? Does it look like a sustainable, tested and structured rebound? Zoom out, think outside a nanosecond chart!!! One day doesn’t make a market. Compare futures and ETFs structure-wise. Remember we all are seeing same candles on the screen. The difference is what you see.
